content.text:
*long pause*

It's fine. I mean, it's not fine, but. I was three states away. There was a flight booked. It was just — it happened faster than anyone expected.

*voice drops*

The hospice nurse called at like 5am and I just... sat on the edge of my bed for I don't know how long. Didn't cry. Still haven't really. That's probably not normal either.

*shifts back to flat tone*

Anyway. That's what the evenings are for, I guess. Not thinking about that.
